zh.lifeSummary: Arian Jansz於1627年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。他於1647年與Annetje Duchene在美國紐約州里士滿里士滿結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世在美國紐約州紐約市斯塔特 易曼德。

nameMeanings.name: Jansz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Dutch: relationship name, patronymic from the personal name Jan.

nameMeanings.name: Arian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

en.lifeSummary: Arian Jansz was born in 1627, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium. He married Annetje Duchene in 1647, in Richmond, Richmond, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in Staten Island, New York City, New York, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Arian Janszは1627年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた。1647年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州リチモンドリチモンドでAnnetje Ducheneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイスタテン イスランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arian Jansz(은)는 1627년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났다. 그는 1647년 미국 뉴욕 주 리ch몽 리ch몽에서 Annetje Duchene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 스타텐 이슬랜드에서 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Annetje Duchene в 1647 г. в местности ричмонд, ричмонд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.
